creator: gobledb@gmail.com
text:
New Spanish FreeBSD user group called "FreeBSD Spain" created by me because isn't exits or not listed yet a Spanish FreeBSD user group.

1- A URL for the user group's website.
https://sites.google.com/site/freebsdspain/

2- An email contact address of a human in charge, for use by our visitors and website administrators.
gobledb@gmail.com

3- A short (one paragraph) description of the user group.
FreeBSD Spain is a new FreeBSD user group for Spanish users for FreeBSD OS where here this users can share knowledge, ideas, opinion, help and other so.
